phases.name: research
steps: Clone brufdev/many-notes and audit feature set (PHP version, DB requirements, multi-user support)
Scrape GitHub issues for top user complaints — these become landing page pain points
Check competitors: Standard Notes pricing, Joplin pricing, Notesnook pricing

phases.name: build
steps: Fork repo, rename to 'NoteVault' or 'QuickNotes Pro', update branding in config
Add Stripe payment link guard at login — free 7-day trial, then $9/mo

phases.name: distribute
steps: Deploy landing page to surge.sh targeting self-hosted notes longtails
Submit to alternativeto.net as Notion/Obsidian alternative
Queue 3 tweets: pain-point hook → feature walkthrough → price anchoring
